items.title: Security install invoice correction and alarm permit
items.summary: Stone Security sent a corrected installation invoice (original was missing tax). Monitoring/hosting invoice coming tomorrow. Still awaiting confirmation on city alarm permit status.
items.actionNeeded: Confirm alarm permit status and review corrected installation invoice.
